primary_text:
Last winter, my cat was off her food for three days. I kept telling myself she would be fine.

She was not. The vet visit cost $150. The guilt of waiting cost more.

Best for Pet: $50/month. Unlimited vet consults, $0 each. All vaccinations. $250 off dental. Walk in any time, no bill shock.

Not insurance. No claims, no excess.

No joining fee. No waiting period. Cancel anytime.

Find a participating clinic near you.
headline: She was off her food. I waited too long.
description: $50/month. Unlimited consults. No more guilt about going in.
cta: Find a participating clinic near you
creative_brief: Warm photo of cat on couch. Personal, emotional, not clinical.
